## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- what canonical docs were updated

## Checks

- [ ] `backend` build passes
- [ ] `frontend` build passes
- [ ] `cli` build passes if touched
- [ ] `forge test -vvv` passes if contracts changed

## Canonical Files Updated

- [ ] `docs/submission` if external understanding changed
- [ ] `STATUS.md` if deployment state changed
- [ ] `backend/TRANSACTION_LEDGER.md` if tx evidence changed
- [ ] `backend/src/config.ts` if backend addresses changed
- [ ] `frontend/src/lib/contracts.ts` if frontend addresses changed

## Claim Discipline

- [ ] no sponsor claim was added without code or evidence
- [ ] historical docs were not silently treated as canonical
